required_preferences.fact: Now adheres to parent company’s mandatory project management protocol for meetings—including shared digital agendas and standardized templates—regardless of lead or participant role; routinely attends drop-in sessions when required by executive directive

supersedes.fact: Requires written agendas shared 24 hours in advance before any meetings she leads—never participates in unscheduled drop-ins

required_preferences.fact: Blocks Thursday afternoons for deep work—Tuesday afternoons reserved for course preparation and teaching tasks at UW; allows limited chat notifications for student and faculty communication during teaching periods

supersedes.fact: Blocks Tuesday and Thursday afternoons for deep work—no chat notifications allowed during these periods

required_preferences.fact: Starts mornings with 10 minutes of guided meditation—never checks work email before this routine
When vacationing, always plans at least one nature-focused activity—avoids city tours unless with her partner
Prefers all meetings and check-ins to be virtual or seated in-office during recovery—avoids any physical movement between rooms or outdoor locations

Prepares lecture materials and assignment rubrics primarily on Sunday evenings to maximize uninterrupted focus before the workweek begins—never delegates teaching prep to weekday evenings unless necessary

persona: A 38-year-old software architect with a background in machine learning
